description: These portable travel blackout curtains provide energy savings by blocking sunlight, reducing outside noise, and offering a customizable fit with Velcro tabs. Made from 100% polyester, they are easy to clean and machine washable. The included suction cups allow for quick mounting on smooth glass surfaces, and the travel bag adds convenience for on-the-go use.
